[Anthropic Academy](/learn)

# Build with Claude

Start developing Claude-powered applications with our comprehensive API guides and best practices

[Start building](https://platform.claude.com/)[Developer docs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/home)

Claude 4.5 Models

Learn how to harness the intelligence and capability of our latest models, Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Claude Opus 4.5

#### Get started

-   [Learn what's new in Sonnet 4.5](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/whats-new-sonnet-4-5)
-   [View a summary of latest features in the release notes](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/release-notes/api)
-   [Easily switch to Claude 4 models with the model migration checklist](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/migrating-to-claude-4)
-   [Choose the right model for your needs with our guide](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/choosing-a-model)
-   [Optimize your results with Claude 4 prompting best practices](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/claude-4-best-practices)

#### Documentation

-   [View our model comparison chart](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/overview)
-   [See pricing for Claude 4](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/pricing)

#### Insights

-   [Read the Claude 4 announcement blog post](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-4)
-   [Visit the Claude Opus 4 website](https://www.anthropic.com/claude/opus)
-   [Visit the Claude Sonnet 4 website](https://www.anthropic.com/claude/sonnet)

APIs & SDKs

Learn about Anthropic's APIs, SDKs, and other development tools

#### Get started with SDKs

-   [Python SDK](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks#python)
-   [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks#typescript)
-   [Java SDK](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks#java)
-   [Go SDK](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks#go)
-   [Ruby SDK](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks#ruby)

#### Get started with APIs

-   [Understand the Messages API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/messages)
-   [Process multiple Messages API requests at once with the Message Batches API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/batch-processing)
-   [Optimize your API usage with prompt caching](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/prompt-caching)
-   [Build on Amazon with the Amazon Bedrock API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/claude-on-amazon-bedrock)
-   [Build on Google with the Vertex AI API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/claude-on-vertex-ai)

#### Go deeper with APIs

-   [Use the Admin API to manage permissions and workspace](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/admin-api/)
-   [Use the Files API to upload and manage files](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/files)
-   [Use PDF support to extract text and understand visual content in PDFs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/pdf-support)
-   [\[Experimental API\] Generate a well written prompt](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/prompt-tools-generate)
-   [\[Experimental API\] Improve a prompt directly in code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/prompt-tools-improve)
-   [\[Experimental API\] Templatize a prompt by identifying and extracting variables](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/prompt-tools-templatize)

#### Courses

-   [Take an in-depth course that covers building with the Anthropic API](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/claude-with-the-anthropic-api)
-   [Take an in-depth course on working with Anthropic models using Amazon Bedrock](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/claude-in-amazon-bedrock)
-   [Take an in-depth course on working with Anthropic models using Google Cloud's Vertex AI](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/claude-with-google-vertex)

Model Context Protocol

Retrieval augmented generation (RAG)

Build effective RAG systems to enhance Claude's responses with external data

Hackathon hacker guide

Resources to help you get started with Claude, whether you're hacking with us at an event or on your own

#### Get started

-   [Set up your developer account and generate API keys on the Anthropic Console.](https://console.anthropic.com)
-   [Use our quickstart guide to make your first API call](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/get-started)

#### Kits & projects
